name: Love Beyond The Fence
original_name: เสียงหัวใจจากอีกฝั่งรั้ว
overview: The story of Khamfah, an employee of an entertainment venue who secretly falls in love with Honey, the sister of the person living across the street. Their relationship is going well, but they run into a big problem when Honey's mother finds out and orders Khamfah to stop having anything to do with Honey. Because of this, their relationship reaches a breaking point.

trailers.title: TEASER ❘ GL Mini Series ❘ เสียงหัวใจจากอีกฝั่งรั้ว ( Love Beyond The Fence )
